name: Daily Standup
description: Time-boxed daily update: what happened, what's next, what's blocked.

sections.title: Yesterday
sections.instruction: What each speaker reported completing since the last standup, as short bullets.

sections.title: Today
sections.instruction: What each speaker plans to work on today, as short bullets.

sections.title: Blockers
sections.instruction: Any impediments raised and who owns them; write 'None raised' if there were none.
